message:
feat(cli,import): support --parent and --dry-run with markdown file import

Enable --parent and --dry-run flags for `br create --file`, which were
previously rejected with validation errors.

Markdown import changes (create.rs):
- Remove validation blocks that rejected --parent and --dry-run when
  used with --file
- Add per-issue parent resolution: each imported issue can specify a
  parent via a `### Parent` header in the markdown, falling back to
  the CLI --parent flag if no per-issue parent is set
- Move issue count fetch outside the retry loop to avoid redundant
  storage queries on ID collisions
- Add dry-run support: when --dry-run is set, skip database lookup
  for JSON output (issues weren't persisted) and display "Dry run:
  would create N issues" instead of "Created N issues"
- Remove unused variable binding in test_parse_optional_date_with_timezone

Markdown parser changes (markdown_import.rs):
- Add `parent: Option<String>` field to ParsedIssue struct
- Add `Parent` variant to the Section enum
- Parse `### Parent` headers and populate the parent field
- Add test_parent_section_parsing and update test_parse_simple_issue

Import cleanup (mod.rs):
- Replace `use crate::config` with `use crate::config::OpenStorageResult`
  for consistency with the update_issue_with_recovery signature

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
